title: capsella bursa-pastoris grandiflora
intro: Capsella bursa-pastoris grandiflora, also known as large-fruited shepherds' purse, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Capsella bursa-pastoris grandiflora include reducing swelling and pain, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
